changelog: Re-designed the Hush brand mark to be fully transparent. Removed the dark navy chip + inner inset frame; the mark is now a single gradient-stroked rounded square (cyan → indigo → violet) with a chrome 'h' floating inside. Added a soft cyan behind-the-letter halo so the 'h' stays readable on photos / busy backgrounds without re-introducing a solid fill. Reads cleaner against any background — side rail, splash, hero images.
